guidelines.title: Undertake Systemic Impacts Mapping
guidelines.notes: Architecture considers sustainability (WSG comments in code) but no formal impact map

guidelines.title: Assess and Research Visitor Needs
guidelines.notes: Targets D&D players specifically; no formal user research documented

guidelines.title: Research Non-Visitor's Needs
guidelines.notes: Tool has no external stakeholders beyond users

guidelines.title: Consider Sustainability in Early Ideation
guidelines.notes: Client-only PWA, no backend, offline-first — sustainability by architecture

guidelines.title: Account for Stakeholder Issues
guidelines.notes: Personal open-source project

guidelines.title: Create a Frictionless Lightweight Experience
guidelines.notes: No login, no tracking, instant access, wizard-based UX

guidelines.title: Avoid Manipulative Patterns
guidelines.notes: No dark patterns, no ads, no upsells, no paywalls

guidelines.title: Provide Accessible and Usable Navigation
guidelines.notes: Skip links, semantic landmarks, keyboard-navigable wizard steps

guidelines.title: Respect the Visitor's Attention
guidelines.notes: No popups, no notifications beyond PWA update prompt

guidelines.title: Use Recognized Design Patterns
guidelines.notes: Standard wizard pattern, familiar card layouts, conventional navigation

guidelines.title: Avoid Unnecessary or An Overabundance of Assets
guidelines.notes: 6 SVG images total (6KB). Zero raster images. No stock photos

guidelines.title: Ensure Sufficient Color Contrast
guidelines.notes: WCAG AA/AAA contrast ratios verified. Dark and light theme both compliant

guidelines.title: Use Accessible Typography
guidelines.notes: System font stack for body. Google Font (Cinzel) with swap for headings. Readable sizes

guidelines.title: Provide Accessible Media
guidelines.notes: All decorative elements use aria-hidden. SVG icons have proper semantics

guidelines.title: Take a More Sustainable Approach to Media
guidelines.notes: Zero video, zero audio, zero raster images. 100% SVG

guidelines.title: Use Efficient Animations
guidelines.notes: Global prefers-reduced-motion in CSS. DiceRoller component ignores this preference

guidelines.title: Incorporate Compatibility Testing
guidelines.notes: Vue3 framework handles cross-browser. No formal browser testing matrix

guidelines.title: Support Non-Graphic Presentation
guidelines.notes: Print stylesheet implemented. Screen-reader friendly with ARIA

guidelines.title: Enable Dark Mode and Eco-Friendly Themes
guidelines.notes: Dark mode default. Light mode available. System preference respected

guidelines.title: Utilize Tooling
guidelines.notes: TypeScript strict mode. No linter, no Lighthouse CI, no accessibility scanner

guidelines.title: Define Performance and Sustainability Budgets
guidelines.notes: No formal performance budget defined. No sustainability metrics tracked
guidelines.action: Define bundle size budgets, LCP/CLS targets, and SCI benchmarks

guidelines.title: Identify Relevant Technical Indicators
guidelines.notes: No performance monitoring or sustainability KPIs
guidelines.action: Integrate SCI Profiler and Lighthouse CI for measurable indicators

guidelines.title: Minify Your HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
guidelines.notes: Vite production build minifies all assets

guidelines.title: Use Code-Splitting
guidelines.notes: Route-level splitting, wizard steps lazy-loaded, variant data chunked, pdf-lib separate

guidelines.title: Apply Tree Shaking to Code
guidelines.notes: Vite/Rollup tree-shakes. jsPDF is unused but still listed in package.json

guidelines.title: Ensure Your Solutions Are Accessible
guidelines.notes: ARIA labels, roles, live regions, skip links, keyboard nav throughout

guidelines.title: Avoid Using Deprecated or Proprietary Technology
guidelines.notes: Modern Vue 3, ES modules, standard web APIs

guidelines.title: Rigorously Assess Third-Party Services
guidelines.notes: Only external dependency is Google Fonts. Zero tracking, zero CDN JS

guidelines.title: Use Native Functions, APIs, and Features
guidelines.notes: localStorage, performance.now, URL API, Intl for locale detection

guidelines.title: Resolve Security Risks
guidelines.notes: CSP headers, input validation, XSS prevention, serialize-javascript override

guidelines.title: Implement Efficient Data Management
guidelines.notes: localStorage with JSON serialize. No unnecessary data fetching

guidelines.title: Include Structured Metadata
guidelines.notes: JSON-LD, OpenGraph, Twitter Cards, canonical URL, robots meta

guidelines.title: Use Responsive Media
guidelines.notes: SVG-only images. Responsive Tailwind utilities

guidelines.title: Lazy Load Non-Critical Resources
guidelines.notes: Routes lazy-loaded. Wizard steps deferred. PDF lib separate chunk

guidelines.title: Provide Accessible Video and Audio
guidelines.notes: No video or audio content

guidelines.title: Take a More Sustainable Approach to Data
guidelines.notes: All data client-side. No API calls. Minimal localStorage footprint

guidelines.title: Only Request Data As Needed
guidelines.notes: Variant data loaded only when selected. No polling, no websockets

guidelines.title: Include Expected and Beneficial Files
guidelines.notes: robots.txt, manifest.json, 404 handling, canonical, structured data

guidelines.title: Support HTTP/2 and Above
guidelines.notes: GitHub Pages supports HTTP/2 by default. No explicit server push

guidelines.title: Implement Server-Side Content Negotiation
guidelines.notes: Static site on GitHub Pages — no server-side logic

guidelines.title: Validate Accessibility
guidelines.notes: No automated accessibility validation in build pipeline
guidelines.action: Add Lighthouse CI with accessibility threshold >= 90

guidelines.title: Choose a Sustainable Hosting Provider
guidelines.notes: GitHub Pages (Microsoft Azure) — carbon-neutral since 2012. Not specifically green-hosted

guidelines.title: Optimize Browser Caching
guidelines.notes: Content-hashed filenames. Service worker CacheFirst for PDFs. Workbox precaching

guidelines.title: Compress Your Files
guidelines.notes: GitHub Pages serves gzip. No Brotli. Build doesn't pre-compress

guidelines.title: Setup Error Pages and Redirection
guidelines.notes: 404.html redirect, catch-all route, safe URL validation

guidelines.title: Limit Usage of Additional Environments
guidelines.notes: Single environment: GitHub Pages. No staging, no preview deployments

guidelines.title: Automate Tasks
guidelines.notes: Manual build and deploy. No CI/CD pipeline
guidelines.action: Add GitHub Actions for automated build, test, and deploy

guidelines.title: Conduct Regular Audits
guidelines.notes: No scheduled audits (performance, accessibility, security)
guidelines.action: Schedule quarterly Lighthouse audits and dependency updates

guidelines.title: Use Environmentally Responsible Server Infrastructure
guidelines.notes: No dedicated server — static files on GitHub Pages CDN

guidelines.title: Support Offline Access
guidelines.notes: Full PWA with service worker. Works completely offline after first visit

guidelines.title: Use a CDN for Caching and Distribution
guidelines.notes: GitHub Pages uses Fastly CDN globally

guidelines.title: Optimize for Energy Efficiency
guidelines.notes: Dark mode default (OLED savings). No CPU-intensive animations. Could measure SCI

guidelines.title: Monitor Server Energy Use
guidelines.notes: No dedicated server to monitor

guidelines.title: Assign a Sustainability Leader
guidelines.notes: Solo developer project

guidelines.title: Establish Sustainability Targets
guidelines.notes: No formal sustainability targets
guidelines.action: Define SCI targets per operation, bundle size limits

guidelines.title: Budget for Sustainability
guidelines.notes: Open-source, no budget

guidelines.title: Implement Sustainability Plans
guidelines.notes: WSG comments in code show awareness. No formal plan

guidelines.title: Assign Environmental Policy
guidelines.notes: Personal project

guidelines.title: Verify Environmental Claims
guidelines.notes: No environmental claims made beyond README mention

guidelines.title: Comply with Relevant Laws and Policies
guidelines.notes: Privacy policy page. No cookies. GDPR-compliant by design (no data collection)

guidelines.title: Maintain a Transparent Data Strategy
guidelines.notes: Privacy page explains localStorage-only data. No server-side data

guidelines.title: Train Stakeholders
guidelines.notes: Solo developer

guidelines.title: Uphold Strong Ethical Standards
guidelines.notes: No dark patterns, no data harvesting, open source, free

guidelines.title: Advocate for Sustainable Practices
guidelines.notes: WSG references in code. Could add sustainability page/badge

guidelines.title: Use Open Standards
guidelines.notes: HTML5, CSS3, ES modules, Web APIs, JSON, PDF standard

guidelines.title: Promote Interoperability
guidelines.notes: JSON import/export, PDF export, URL sharing — all open formats

guidelines.title: Respect User Preferences
guidelines.notes: Dark/light theme, language auto-detect, reduced motion, localStorage persistence

guidelines.title: Support Civic Engagement
guidelines.notes: Not applicable to game tool

guidelines.title: Provide Accessible Communication
guidelines.notes: Bilingual (IT/EN). Screen reader friendly. Simple language

guidelines.title: Ensure Equitable Access
guidelines.notes: Free, no login, no paywall, offline capable, PWA installable

guidelines.title: Promote Responsible Consumption
guidelines.notes: No ads, no in-app purchases, no engagement tricks

guidelines.title: Implement Inclusive Hiring
guidelines.notes: Solo developer

guidelines.title: Support Community Engagement
guidelines.notes: Open source on GitHub. No contributing guidelines or community docs

guidelines.title: Raise Awareness and Educate
guidelines.notes: No sustainability documentation for contributors

guidelines.title: Share Best Practices
guidelines.notes: Code has WSG reference comments. Could document patterns more formally

guidelines.title: Promote Responsible Data Practices
guidelines.notes: Zero data collection. Privacy-first architecture

guidelines.title: Implement Ethical Marketing
guidelines.notes: No marketing

guidelines.title: Promote Responsible Procurement
guidelines.notes: No procurement

guidelines.title: Implement a Sustainable Event Policy
guidelines.notes: N/A

guidelines.title: Facilitate Education
guidelines.notes: Blog with character profiles. Could add sustainability learning content
